content.en:
have all broken through to the realm of mythology to the Dao realm, and they can also superimpose the body of mythology.

Xiao Yue was shocked at the same time, but also humbly said: "Husband, give the mythical blood and bones to the stars first!"

"Yue'er, wait for the strongest mythical body of the stars to complete the ninth transformation, and then let him practice with the help of mythical blood and bones. You are cultivating the top Mythical Body, and it is easier to cultivate, so you can use it first!" Ye Tian said.

Under Ye Tian's persuasion, Xiao Yue still took the innate original treasure of mythical blood bones.

After that, Ye Tian also took out various resources to cultivate his wife, striving to let her cultivate the Mythical Body to nine transformations as soon as possible, and superimpose more top-notch Mythical Bodies again and again.

And at this time, those mythical creatures he killed in the Valley of Myths would be useful.

Ye Tian took out the blood of mythology from their bodies and gave it to his wife.

With the help of the Mythical Blood and Bone, the wife does not need to start cultivating from the Legendary Body, and can directly start cultivating from the Mythical Body, saving a long time of penance.

And Ye Tian is also working hard to improve his strength, he uses the Eternal Rule Disk to fuse low-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, and at the same time, he also uses up a lot of mythical spirit objects that help to improve the Mythical Body, which is used to improve his Mythical Body.

Under such circumstances, it wouldn't take too long for Ye Tian to complete the eighth Mythical Body transformation.

At that time, his strength will increase by a fraction.

Three million years after the Dao Era.

With the help of the low-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items fused with the Eternal Rule Disk, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and now he had raised the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the realm of three percent.

When he uses up those Eternal Sequence Dao Rule items, there is a high probability that he can raise the Eternal Sequence Dao Rule to the realm of fifty percent.

"The Body of Myths is about to complete its eighth metamorphosis!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

It's been another time.

Rumble!!!!

The dragon scale mythical body took the lead in completing the eighth transformation, and then the other mythical bodies also completed the eighth transformation one by one, and the strength of the whole person skyrocketed.

"My current strength is too strong, the First Elder should no longer be my opponent, but it is still not as good as the First Demon Venerable!" Ye Tian muttered.

The First Demon Venerable can easily hurt the First Elder, but the First Elder has a lot of Innate Primal Treasures, including the Innate Primordial Treasure that instantly repairs the injury, and there are many hole cards that can hurt the First Demon Venerable.

In fact, the strength of the First Elder himself was not enough in the eyes of the First Demon Venerable.

"It's already the eighth metamorphosis, and if I metamorphose again, it will be the ninth metamorphosis, and I will also reach the limit of the Mythical Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He continued to cultivate, and at the same time, he continued to comprehend the rules of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao.

In addition, he also created a Gate Eternal Sequence to Dao Divine Power, which can maximize the power of the Eternal Sequence Dao Rules.

......

Valley of Myths.

Ye Tian set his sights on the territory of a mythical spirit, the strength of this mythical spirit was much more terrifying than that of the First Demon Venerable, even if he was now, he would hold on for a while at most.

The reason why he set his sights on this mythical spirit was that after a break-in, he saw something good.

That's the low-quality first-order Dao rule item vein!

It was a special yellow stone, a first-order Supreme Dao rule item, but it formed a vein, and it was estimated that there were thousands of that yellow stone.

So.

Ye Tian really wants to snatch this ore vein, if he gets it, he will make a lot of money!

"Send the Innate Primordial Treasure Xuanyu Plate in!"

Ye Tian decided.

The Xuanyu Plate was obtained by him from the Valley of Mythology, and then brought it out, and after identification, he learned that the Xuanyu Plate was similar to the effect of the Heavenly Sword Plate, which could form a formation.

Ye Tian was going to use the Xuanyu Plate to arrange a formation to trap that mythical spirit for a while, giving himself enough time to snatch those first-order Supreme Dao rule items and other resources.

Of course.

If this is done, the Xuanyu Plate will definitely be wasted, and even one or two replica bodies will be lost, but it will be worth it.

this day.

A copy of Ye Tian's body entered the Valley of Mythology again, sending the Xuanyu Plate in.

And he had already studied the formation ability of the Xuanyu Plate, which could be used directly.

......

Inside the Valley of Myths.

Ye Tian took the Xuanyu Plate to the Mythical Spirit Territory.

Rumble!!!

An incomparably large Mythical Spirit descended and grabbed Ye Tian with one hand.

"Xuanyu Plate, Xuanyu Great Array!"

Rumble!!!

The three replica bodies activated the Xuanyu Disk, trapping the mythical spirit.

Immediately afterward, another replica body broke into the territory of the Spirit of Myths and began to seize those first-order Supreme Dao Rule stones.

This is a first-order supreme rule item, and it will help him too much.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian opened the other party's lair and dug out those yellow stones.

At the same time, other resources, such as the Innate Primordial Treasure, he also took them away directly, and none of them remained.

"Gotta hurry!"

Ye Tian continued to shatter the nest and find the yellow stones hidden in the depths one by one.

Time passed, and this first sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items gradually fell into Ye Tian's hands.

Gradually, Ye Tian's harvest became bigger and bigger.

In the end, Ye Tian was cleaned.

"Let's go!"

His replica body escaped.

And the Xuanyu array formed by the Xuanyu Plate couldn't bear it.

Click!!!!

The Xuanyu Great Array shattered, and the Xuanyu Disk also shattered.

Immediately afterwards, the spirit of the myth was furious, and a move full of killing intent blasted, directly killing one of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies.

The other two replica bodies erupted, injuring the Spirit of Mythology, but they were still pierced through their bodies with their backhands, and both fell in a short time.

I have to say that this mythical spirit is too terrifying, and after the outbreak, even if the first demon venerable comes, I am afraid that I will not be able to bear it.

But Ye Tian's fourth replica body had already fled and left its territory, and it couldn't chase it down.

......

"It's a success, and this time it's a big gain!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

If this opportunity comes a few more times, maybe in the future, there will be hope for comprehending the rules of the Eternal Sequence to the Ten Perfection Realm.

After all, so many first-order supreme rule items, how many eternal sequence supreme rule items have to be fused into them!

Before you know it, another few million solstice eras have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian was getting closer and closer to the ninth transformation, and he was also extremely excited.
